---
title: "About"
---

## Background

I am currently based at INSEAD, working as a research collaborator on projects spanning quantitative marketing and digital platforms. My training combines a data-science / machine-learning foundation with growing expertise in structural econometrics and economic modeling.

## Education

- *(degree, institution, year)* — placeholder, to be filled in.

## Experience

- *(role, institution / company, period)* — placeholder, to be filled in.

## Skills

- **Languages**: Python, R, SQL, some Stata
- **Methods**: structural estimation, discrete choice, Bayesian inference, applied ML
- **Tooling**: Quarto, Linux, AWS, git

## Contact

Email: [weinan.hu@insead.edu](mailto:weinan.hu@insead.edu)
